name: Ryan Baumann
role: Head of DevX at Google Maps Platform
tagline: BUILDER PLATFORMS · DEVELOPER TOOLS · AI CODING AGENTS
profileHeadline: Head of DevX · Google Maps Platform
intro: I work on engineering and product teams that help AI-powered builders activate faster and get the most value out of the platform.
description: Ryan Baumann leads Developer Experience at Google Maps Platform, building tools, evals, and reference apps for humans and AI coding agents.
aboutTeaser: I lead Developer Experience Engineering and product. I stay close to the code by reviewing traces, writing evals, and shipping apps.

sectionIntros.work: Shipped tools, open-source libraries, and experiments, with the problem and result behind each.
sectionIntros.writing: Notes on builder platforms, AI coding agents, evals, and open source.
sectionIntros.talks: Demo-first talks on developer tools, AI-assisted development, and reliable generated code.
sectionIntros.demos: Labs is where I learn in public through working reference apps and experiments.

positioning: Developer Experience Engineering, product, and AI coding agents.
defaultShareImageAlt: Social card reading Builder platforms for humans + agents beside an abstract blue and purple circuit network.
answerEngineSummary: Ryan Baumann is a Developer Experience Engineering and product lead who builds tools, evals, and workflows for humans and AI coding agents. His current work at Google Maps Platform includes Code Assist, agent skills, and an agentic eval suite.
